title: Teaching Assistants, Special Education
description: Assist a preschool, elementary, middle, or secondary school teacher to provide academic, social, or life skills to students who have learning, emotional, or physical disabilities. Serve in a position for which a teacher has primary responsibility for the design and implementation of educational programs and services.

tasks.text: Provide assistance to students with special needs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Teach socially acceptable behavior, employing techniques such as behavior modification or positive reinforcement.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Supervise students in classrooms, halls, cafeterias, school yards, and gymnasiums, or on field trips.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide students with disabilities with assistive devices, supportive technology, and assistance accessing facilities, such as restrooms.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Carry out therapeutic regimens, such as behavior modification and personal development programs, under the supervision of special education instructors, psychologists, or speech-language pathologists.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Tutor and assist children individually or in small groups to help them master assignments and to reinforce learning concepts presented by teachers.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Employ special educational strategies or techniques during instruction to improve the development of sensory- and perceptual-motor skills, language, cognition, or memory.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Enforce administration policies and rules governing students.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Observe students' performance, and record relevant data to assess progress.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Instruct and monitor students in the use and care of equipment and materials to prevent injuries and damage.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Present subject matter to students under the direction and guidance of teachers, using lectures, discussions, supervised role-playing methods, or by reading aloud.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Discuss assigned duties with classroom teachers to coordinate instructional efforts.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Instruct students in daily living skills required for independent maintenance and self-sufficiency, such as hygiene, safety, or food preparation.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare classrooms with a variety of materials or resources for children to explore, manipulate, or use in learning activities or imaginative play.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Distribute teaching materials, such as textbooks, workbooks, papers, and pencils, to students.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Organize and supervise games and other recreational activities to promote physical, mental, and social development.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Use computers, audio-visual aids, and other equipment and materials to supplement presentations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean classrooms.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Organize and label materials and display students' work in a manner appropriate for their eye levels and perceptual skills.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare lesson materials, bulletin board displays, exhibits, equipment, and demonstrations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Grade homework and tests, and compute and record results, using answer sheets or electronic marking devices.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Assist in bus loading and unloading.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Take class attendance and maintain attendance records.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Maintain computers in classrooms and laboratories, and assist students with hardware and software use.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare lesson outlines and plans in assigned subject areas and submit outlines to teachers for review.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Participate in teacher-parent conferences regarding students' progress or problems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Assist librarians in school libraries.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Requisition and stock teaching materials and supplies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Attend staff meetings and serve on committees, as required.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Laminate teaching materials to increase their durability under repeated use.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
